duplicate_escape.reason: advisor repeated already-tested experiments for 3 attempt(s)

expected_effect: Small config move for continued exploration.
label: fallback-highertimeframeresolution-30min
rationale: Fallback deterministic recommendation because AI advisor was unavailable. Duplicate escape reason: advisor repeated already-tested experiments for 3 attempt(s).

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day high-win-rate, take-profit-only long scalper regime. There are no realized-loss trades and no slow >=12h trades, so the real risk is hidden MAE, recovery duration...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $621 current run_056 baseline and preferably recovers toward leader-family ~$1300, average MAE improves versus -156.9, total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=95% protected fast winners and >=90% affected-profile PnL.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile positive standalone PnL or lower combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit >=98% of leader-family baseline, protected fast-winner retention >=95%.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Call-wall worst MAE materially improves while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total PnL >=98% of leader, slow_12h remains 0.

next_experiments.config_bias: Use isolated call_wall_acceptance_long admission/realization research. Prefer persistence and target-shape containment over disabling the profile or broad option-flow tightening.
next_experiments.name: Call-Wall Tail Containment Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE improves below -655.2, call_wall_acceptance_long retains >=70% PnL, total net profit >=98% of run_044/run_055 leader family, completed trades drop <=10%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Only nudge profile-aware extended-VWAP rejection boundaries. Avoid broad ES-VWAP caps, setup floors, RSI floors, or global structure-score changes.
next_experiments.name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Boundary Retest
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE, retained PnL >=98% of baseline, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, extended_vwap_winner retention >=95%, total score flat or better.

next_experiments.config_bias: Do not tighten breakout_long_1dte directly first. Test 1DTE attribution or companion routing if legal; otherwise freeze existing 1DTE while studying diagnostics.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Companion Split Attribution
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, 1DTE average/worst MAE, 1DTE PnL/hour, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL/trades, total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: State-specific no-0DTE holdout only. Preserve the clean EXPIRED_0DTE winner and pullback_no_0dte STALE edge; target stale breakout inefficiency separately if expressible.
next_experiments.name: No-0DTE Stale Breakout Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Fallback PnL/hour improves, fallback worst MAE flat or better, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count unchanged, total net profit >=98% baseline.

next_experiments.config_bias: Freeze broad pullback admission. Study local weak-structure/early-heat signatures only if they can spare protected fast winners.
next_experiments.name: Pullback Charm-Pin Heat Box Diagnostics
next_experiments.primary_metric: Affected-profile worst MAE improves, pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long retain >=90% PnL, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, total PnL/hour flat or better.

next_experiments.config_bias: Run exactly one dormant valid-0DTE activation only if optimizer can replace the full router list and attribute standalone PnL. Keep same-profile tuning minimal.
next_experiments.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: Dormant standalone PnL, combined charm/pin/wall worst MAE, cannibalization, protected winner retention, total score.
